name: thirdflare
description: ThirdFlare One — unofficial cross-platform Cloudflare One client via warp-cli.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check lib/config.mjs && node --check lib/version.mjs && node --check lib/warp/status.mjs && node --check lib/warp/registration.mjs && node --check lib/killswitch/rules.mjs && node --check lib/killswitch/apply.mjs && node --check lib/killswitch/enroll-pause.mjs && node --check lib/killswitch/index.mjs && node --check lib/notify/desktop.mjs && node --check lib/notify/status-watcher.mjs && node --check lib/update/semver.mjs && node --check lib/update/github.mjs && node --check lib/update/manifest.mjs && node --check lib/update/detect-format.mjs && node --check lib/update/confirm.mjs && node --check lib/update/apply-appimage.mjs && node --check lib/update/index.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/i18n.js && node --check public/service-worker.js && node --check scripts/health-check.mjs && node --check scripts/port-open.mjs && node --check scripts/mock-warp-cli.mjs && node --check scripts/ui-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-warp-integration.test.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-mock-warp.test.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-openapi.test.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-update.test.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-notify.test.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-registration.test.mjs && node --check scripts/ci-killswitch.test.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-update-manifest.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:mock-warp && npm run test:integration && npm run test:openapi && npm run test:update && npm run test:notify && npm run test:registration && npm run test:killswitch
